/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libconnect4_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so -o libconnect4_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so CMakeFiles/connect4_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/connect4_msgs/msg/detail/dds_fastrtps/board_state__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/connect4_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/connect4_msgs/msg/detail/dds_fastrtps/winner__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/connect4_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/connect4_msgs/action/detail/dds_fastrtps/deliver_block__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/connect4_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/connect4_msgs/action/detail/dds_fastrtps/reset_board__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/kilted/lib:/home/danie/connect4_ros/build/connect4_msgs: /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libaction_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libunique_identifier_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so libconnect4_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libfastcdr.so.2.3.3 /opt/ros/kilted/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libaction_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libunique_identifier_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
